zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏弱
zh.content:
当前Solana价格维持在66.12美元附近，较20日均线66.76略低，显示短期均线承压，价格处于轻微下行通道中。短线趋势偏弱，但未出现明显下破支撑，市场仍以震荡为主。投资者需关注价格能否稳住当前区间。  

MACD指标处于0.077水平，显示多空力量略微偏多，但缺少信号线参考，判断动能仍不明确。结合价格与均线位置，短期多头力量不足，若突破66.76美元，将有望重拾上行动能。相反若跌破65.90美元，将触发短线下行风险。  

近期支撑位初步设在65.90美元和65.50美元，阻力位则在66.76美元和67.20美元附近。价格在支撑位获得支撑时，可考虑低位试探多单，若接近阻力位则谨慎短线减仓或观望。关键点位突破将决定下一波趋势方向。  

综合来看，Solana短期呈现震荡偏弱格局，交易者应以区间操作为主，避免追高。可在支撑附近布局多单，并设置止损在65.80美元以下，同时在阻力位附近考虑减仓或短线空单，以控制风险并捕捉波段机会。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading at 66.12, almost unchanged over the last 24 hours, reflecting a market that is consolidating after recent movement. The current price remains below the 20-period simple moving average at 66.76, indicating that short-term momentum is slightly bearish. The narrow daily range between 65.97 and 66.25 suggests reduced volatility and a temporary balance between buyers and sellers as the market searches for direction.

Technical indicators present a mixed picture. The MACD value of 0.077 remains positive, which suggests underlying bullish momentum has not completely disappeared. However, the absence of a confirmed signal line reading limits the strength of that interpretation. At the same time, trading below the SMA(20) implies that sellers currently hold a modest advantage. With RSI data unavailable, momentum assessment relies primarily on price behavior and the MACD structure.

Key support is located near the session low at 65.97, with additional psychological support around 65.50 should selling pressure increase. On the upside, immediate resistance appears near 66.25, followed by the SMA(20) region around 66.76. A sustained break above the moving average would improve the short-term outlook and could attract fresh buying interest. Conversely, a decisive move below support may trigger a deeper pullback toward lower price zones.

For traders, patience may be appropriate until a clearer directional signal emerges. Aggressive bullish positions could be considered only after a confirmed breakout above 66.76 with increasing volume, targeting higher resistance levels. Short-term bearish setups become more attractive if price falls below 65.97 and maintains downside momentum. Risk management remains essential, as the current consolidation phase increases the likelihood of false breakouts and rapid reversals before a stronger trend develops.
